CashMachineProcessingRate.description: Processing rate of a cash-based machine in people per hour

CardMachineProcessingRate.description: Processing rate of a card-only machine in people per hour

CashMachinePaperRolls.description: Number of paper rolls used per hour by a cash-based machine

CardMachinePaperRolls.description: Number of paper rolls used per hour by a card-only machine

MinPeopleProcessed.description: Minimum number of people that must be processed per hour

MaxPaperRolls.description: Maximum number of paper rolls that can be used per hour

notes: All variables in `problem_info.json` were incorrectly marked as continuous.

Fixed typo in first constraint's LaTeX formulation in `47_c` and `47_d`
(was mixing params × vars nonlinearly; corrected to match Gurobi code:
$A \cdot s + K \cdot r \geq U$).

Added missing objective scaling to `problem_info` for the `_i`
transformation (present in code but absent from `problem_info`).
Implicit non-negativity assumption for every problem parameter.
